channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Man taken to hospital following residential fire in Vaughan
item.description: A residential fire in Vaughan, Ontario, left one man injured and requiring hospital care, according to local emergency services. Fire crews responded to the incident in the early hours of the morning ...

item.title: Reggae Band Faces Challenges from Unauthorized AI-Generated Remixes
item.description: California-based reggae band Stick Figure recently experienced an unexpected surge in popularity when their seven-year-old track 'Angels Above Me' topped iTunes charts in six countries. However, the v...

item.title: Davido Marks 15 Years in Music with 15 Defining Hit Songs
item.description: Today na big day for Davido fans and Afrobeats lovers as David Adedeji Adeleke, wey everybody sabi as Davido, don celebrate 15 years for music industry. E all start on May 7, 2011, with him debut sing...

item.title: Community trinket exchanges spread joy through free swapping of miniature collectibles
item.description: Trinket exchanges are gaining popularity as informal community installations where people swap small items such as miniature animals, keyrings, stickers, pins, and other small objects. Inspired by Lit...

item.title: Five Children and Woman Die in Yamuna Boat Accident in Hamirpur, UP; Search Continues for Missing Boy
item.description: On Wednesday evening, a tragic incident occurred in Kutubpur Patiya hamlet under Bhauli gram panchayat in Hamirpur, Uttar Pradesh, when a boat carrying nine passengers, excluding the boatman, capsized...

item.title: Vijay's Party Seeks Support from VCK and Other Allies to Form Tamil Nadu Government
item.description: In Tamil Nadu, the newly established Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam (TVK) led by actor-politician Vijay has sought support from other parties to form the state government after emerging as the single-larges...

item.title: Umar Sani Says Wike Lacks PDP Documents, Criticises His Media Claims
item.description: During an interview on ARISE Television’s ‘Morning Show’, Umar Sani, a key member of the Taminu Turaki-led PDP faction, claimed that FCT Minister Nyesom Wike does not hold any official documents of th...

item.title: California Startup to Pilot Mini Data Centers in Residential Areas
item.description: A California startup named Span is partnering with Nvidia, PulteGroup, and other homebuilders to explore installing small-scale data centers in suburban homes. The goal is to reduce reliance on tradit...

item.title: Tanzanian conjoined twins undergo complex separation surgery in Saudi Arabia
item.description: Nancy na Nice, pair ya Tanzanian conjoined twins, wameanza leo upasuaji wa kuwatenganisha huko Riyadh, Saudi Arabia. Hii ni operation ngumu sana na yenye hatari, ikifanywa na timu ya madaktari 34 chin...

item.title: Clash between Pope Leo XIV and Donald Trump over war, morality, and global leadership
item.description: This opinion piece explores the escalating public clash between Pope Leo XIV and former US President Donald Trump, framing it as a modern version of the long-standing tension between spiritual and pol...

item.title: Formica Corporation Names Winners of 2026 Student Innovation Competition Focused on Mood-Boosting Design
item.description: Formica Corporation has revealed the winners of its ninth annual FORM Student Innovation Competition, which saw a record 303 eligible submissions from interior design, architecture, and furniture desi...

item.title: Canada Reduces U.S. Alcohol Imports Following Trade Dispute
item.description: Since early 2025, Canada has significantly reduced its imports of American alcohol in response to U.S. tariffs imposed by President Donald Trump, who cited national security concerns. The tariffs trig...

item.title: Survey Shows Low Economic Autonomy Awareness Among Tanzanian Women
item.description: A recent national survey in Tanzania has shown that only 26 percent of women believe dem should get freedom to make their own economic decisions. The survey, part of the Women’s Empowerment and Nutrit...

item.title: CS Ruku Discovers Mass Absenteeism During Surprise Inspection at Garissa Government Offices
item.description: On the morning of May 7, 2026, Public Service Cabinet Secretary Geoffrey Ruku carried out a surprise early dawn inspection at the North Eastern Regional Offices in Garissa. The spot check revealed a w...

item.title: Practical Methods to Restore Shrunken Clothes, According to Fabric Experts
item.description: The article explains why clothes shrink and offers practical methods to help restore garments to their original size. According to laundry professionals, natural fibers such as wool, cotton, and linen...

item.title: Rubio meets Vatican officials amid tensions between Trump and Pope Leo over Iran and diplomacy
item.description: U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio visited the Vatican in an effort to stabilize relations following a series of public criticisms by President Donald Trump directed at Pope Leo XIV. The tensions ste...

item.title: Council halts unauthorised traveller site construction in Essex
item.description: Construction work on a suspected unauthorised traveller site in Willows Green, near Felsted, Essex, has been ordered to stop by Uttlesford District Council. The work reportedly began just as the counc...

item.title: Federal Constitutional Court declares Section 7E of Income Tax Ordinance unconstitutional, terminates all related FBR actions
item.description: The Federal Constitutional Court of Pakistan has declared the controversial Section 7E of the Income Tax Ordinance 2001 as unconstitutional and void in its entirety. This important judgment was announ...

item.title: Nigerian Military Detains Over 10 Soldiers at CIC Facility Over Alleged Leaks on Activist Justice Crack's Detention
item.description: According to military sources wey speak to SaharaReporters, the Nigerian Army don detain more than 10 soldiers inside underground facilities at the Counter Intelligence Corps (CIC) for alleged leaking...

item.title: National Assembly Plans Countrywide Public Hearings for Kenya's Proposed Sh4.78 Trillion Budget 2026/27
item.description: The National Assembly Budget and Appropriations Committee is set to hold public hearings in 16 selected counties to collect views from Kenyans on the proposed Sh4.78 trillion budget for the 2026/27 fi...
